theme.settings.text.014: These values are used in the site footer, contact page, and SEO metadata.
theme.settings.text.023: Choose the theme color scheme. The public site updates immediately after saving.
theme.settings.text.025: Dark navy base with orange accents for industrial and construction sites
theme.settings.text.027: Dark navy base with blue accents for SaaS, AI, and B2B product teams
theme.settings.text.029: Black base with silver accents for minimal technology, media, and art sites
theme.settings.text.031: Dark violet base with purple accents for premium, AI, and crypto technology sites
theme.settings.text.033: Deep green base with emerald accents for sustainability, health, and nature-focused sites
theme.settings.text.035: Near-black base with red accents for events, media, fashion, and high-recognition launches
theme.settings.text.037: Ink-blue base with electric cyan accents for finance, SaaS, and IoT
theme.settings.text.042: When set, the image logo takes priority. Leave blank to use the initials logo.
theme.settings.text.043: Use a combined logo image instead of separate logo and brand text
theme.settings.text.044: When enabled, the navigation only renders the combined logo image below. Use this when the image already contains the brand name.
theme.settings.text.046: Recommended: horizontal PNG/SVG, transparent background, height no more than 32px. Only applies when combined logo is enabled.
theme.settings.text.048: Footer backgrounds are usually dark. Upload a light version here, or leave blank to reuse the navigation combined logo.
theme.settings.text.050: Configure up to three slides, each with a label, title, description, background image, and buttons.
theme.settings.text.063: Leave blank to disable image click-through. You can link to products, services, showcase items, or any internal page.
theme.settings.text.073: Key metrics displayed on a dark band, up to four items.
theme.settings.text.083: Products are shown by ascending sort_order. Adjust order in the Products admin list.
theme.settings.text.086: Services are shown by ascending sort_order. Adjust order in the Services admin list.
theme.settings.text.088: Only affects the Atelier Slate showcase page. The default grid remains compatible; the mosaic layout is better for large visual cases.
theme.settings.text.091: Mosaic images with floating copy cards
theme.settings.text.092: Showcase items are shown by ascending sort_order and can be reordered in the Showcase admin list.
theme.settings.text.094: Shows partner logos between Services and CTA on the homepage. Logos are grayscale by default and become color on hover. Up to 24 slots; empty slots are hidden.
theme.settings.text.095: Display mode switches automatically: 6 or fewer are centered and static; 7-12 scroll in one row; 13+ split into two opposite scrolling rows.
theme.settings.text.108: Configure all copy and images for the About page. Empty fields use defaults.
theme.settings.text.121: +1 555 0100 (include country code; leave blank to hide)
theme.settings.text.123: WeChat ID or QR code URL
theme.settings.text.133: https://... leave blank to disable link
theme.settings.title: %s - Theme Settings
